items.title: Greetings and Introductions
items.prompt: Practice greeting someone and introducing yourself in English.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Good morning', 'How are you?', and 'My name is...'.
items.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

ja.prompt: 誰かに挨拶して自己紹介を英語で練習しましょう。
ja.hint: 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

zh.prompt: 練習用英文，向別人打招呼並自我介紹。
zh.hint: 使用像是 'Good morning', 'How are you?', 'My name is...' 的句子。
zh.sample: Good morning! How are you? My name is Kate. Nice to meet you.

items.title: Asking and Answering About Objects
items.prompt: Ask and answer questions about objects using 'What is this?' and 'What is that?'.
items.hint: Use simple answers like 'It's a book' or 'It's a pencil'.
items.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

ja.prompt: 'What is this?' と 'What is that?' を使って物について質問し、答えましょう。
ja.hint: 'It's a book' や 'It's a pencil' のような簡単な答えを使いましょう。
ja.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

zh.prompt: 用 'What is this?' 和 'What is that?' 問物品並回答。
zh.hint: 用簡單句子回答，如 'It's a book' 或 'It's a pencil'。
zh.sample: What's this? It's a book. What's that? It's a box.

items.title: Talking About Abilities
items.prompt: Practice asking and answering about abilities using 'Can you...?' and 'Yes, I can' or 'No, I can't'.
items.hint: Use verbs like swim, jump, dance.
items.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

ja.prompt: 'Can you...?' を使って能力について質問し、'Yes, I can' または 'No, I can't' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: swim, jump, dance のような動詞を使いましょう。
ja.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Can you...?' 問能力，並用 'Yes, I can' 或 'No, I can't' 回答。
zh.hint: 使用像 swim, jump, dance 的動詞。
zh.sample: Can you swim? Yes, I can. Can you jump? No, I can't.

items.title: Talking About Time and Daily Routine
items.prompt: Ask and answer about daily routines and times using 'What time do you get up?' and 'I get up at...'.
items.hint: Use time expressions like six o'clock or seven thirty.
items.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

ja.prompt: 日課や時間について 'What time do you get up?' と聞き、'I get up at...' と答えましょう。
ja.hint: six o'clock や seven thirty のような時間表現を使いましょう。
ja.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

zh.prompt: 問答日常作息和時間，使用 'What time do you get up?' 和 'I get up at...'。
zh.hint: 使用六點、七點半等時間表達。
zh.sample: What time do you get up? I get up at six.

items.title: Describing People and Possessions
items.prompt: Practice asking about and describing people and possessions using 'Who is he/she?' and 'It's mine/yours'.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'He is my teacher' or 'It's Mike's bike'.
items.sample: Who is he? He is my teacher. Whose bike is this? It's Mike's.

ja.prompt: 'Who is he/she?' と 'It's mine/yours' を使って人や所有物について質問し、説明しましょう。
ja.hint: 'He is my teacher' や 'It's Mike's bike' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Who is he? He is my teacher. Whose bike is this? It's Mike's.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'Who is he/she?' 和 'It's mine/yours' 問人和物品並描述。
zh.hint: 使用 'He is my teacher' 或 'It's Mike's bike' 等句子。
zh.sample: Who is he? He is my teacher. Whose bike is this? It's Mike's.

items.title: Talking About Likes and Dislikes
items.prompt: Practice expressing likes and dislikes using 'Do you like...?' and 'Yes, I do' or 'No, I don't'.
items.hint: Use food or sports like cheese, ham, baseball, soccer.
items.sample: Do you like cheese? Yes, I do. Do you like ham? No, I don't.

ja.prompt: 'Do you like...?' を使って好き嫌いを表現し、'Yes, I do' または 'No, I don't' で答えましょう。
ja.hint: cheese, ham, baseball, soccer のような食べ物やスポーツを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Do you like cheese? Yes, I do. Do you like ham? No, I don't.

zh.prompt: 用 'Do you like...?' 表達喜好，並用 'Yes, I do' 或 'No, I don't' 回答。
zh.hint: 使用起司、火腿、棒球、足球等食物或運動。
zh.sample: Do you like cheese? Yes, I do. Do you like ham? No, I don't.

items.title: Asking for and Giving Directions
items.prompt: Practice asking for directions and giving simple instructions like 'Go straight' and 'Turn right'.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'Excuse me, where is the science museum?' and 'Go straight and turn right at the bank.'
items.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

ja.prompt: 道を尋ねたり、'Go straight' や 'Turn right' のような簡単な指示を出したりする練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: 'Excuse me, where is the science museum?' や 'Go straight and turn right at the bank.' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

zh.prompt: 練習問路和給簡單指示，如 'Go straight' 和 'Turn right'。
zh.hint: 使用 'Excuse me, where is the science museum?' 和 'Go straight and turn right at the bank.' 等句子。
zh.sample: Excuse me, where is the science museum? Go straight and turn right at the bank.

items.title: Talking About Weather and Clothing
items.prompt: Practice talking about weather and what to wear using phrases like 'It's cold and windy' and 'Put on your coat'.
items.hint: Use weather words like snowing, raining and clothing items like coat, hat.
items.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

ja.prompt: 天気や服装について、'It's cold and windy' や 'Put on your coat' のようなフレーズで話す練習をしましょう。
ja.hint: snowing, raining のような天気の言葉や coat, hat のような服の単語を使いましょう。
ja.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

zh.prompt: 練習用關於天氣和穿著的句子，如 'It's cold and windy' 和 'Put on your coat'。
zh.hint: 使用下雪、下雨等天氣詞彙和外套、帽子等衣物詞彙。
zh.sample: It's cold and windy. Put on your coat, please.

items.title: Talking About School Subjects and Activities
items.prompt: Practice talking about favorite school subjects and activities using 'My favorite subject is...' and 'I like playing...'.
items.hint: Use subjects like math, PE and activities like basketball, soccer.
items.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

ja.prompt: 好きな教科や活動について 'My favorite subject is...' や 'I like playing...' を使って話しましょう。
ja.hint: math, PE のような教科や basketball, soccer のような活動を使いましょう。
ja.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

zh.prompt: 練習用 'My favorite subject is...' 和 'I like playing...' 談論喜歡的科目和活動。
zh.hint: 使用數學、體育等科目和籃球、足球等活動。
zh.sample: My favorite subject is PE. I like playing basketball.

items.title: Describing Daily Activities and Past Events
items.prompt: Practice describing what you did yesterday or during vacation using past tense verbs.
items.hint: Use phrases like 'I went to the park', 'I made cookies', 'I took Taekwondo lessons'.
items.sample: Yesterday, I went to the park and flew kites. I made cookies too.

ja.prompt: 昨日や休暇中にしたことを過去形の動詞で説明しましょう。
ja.hint: 'I went to the park', 'I made cookies', 'I took Taekwondo lessons' のようなフレーズを使いましょう。
ja.sample: Yesterday, I went to the park and flew kites. I made cookies too.

zh.prompt: 用過去式動詞描述昨天或假期做了什麼。
zh.hint: 使用 'I went to the park', 'I made cookies', 'I took Taekwondo lessons' 等句子。
zh.sample: Yesterday, I went to the park and flew kites. I made cookies too.
